jobs.status_running_desc: AI is actively processing this job. Duration depends on task complexity (30s – 5min).
jobs.status_completed_desc: Job finished successfully. Results are available. Click to view.
jobs.status_failed_desc: Job failed. System retries automatically up to 3 times. Contact support if persistent.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro_summary: These terms govern your use of AI-IDEI, a knowledge extraction and capitalization platform operated by Cușnir Media SRL (Republic of Moldova). By using our platform, you agree to these terms. We wrote them in simple language so you can actually understand what you are agreeing to.
terms.s1_text: By accessing or using AI-IDEI, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform. Creating an account or using any service constitutes acceptance.
terms.s2_text: AI-IDEI is an AI-powered platform that transforms raw content — audio, video, text — into structured knowledge units called "neurons" and generates reusable digital assets (articles, strategies, reports). We process your content using artificial intelligence to deliver measurable results.
terms.s3_text: You must provide accurate information when creating your account. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential.
terms.s3_text2: If you suspect unauthorized access to your account, notify us immediately. We are not liable for damages resulting from unauthorized use that you failed to report.
terms.s4_text: You retain full ownership of everything you upload. By uploading content, you grant AI-IDEI a limited, non-exclusive license to process it solely for delivering the service to you.
terms.s4_highlight: We do not sell, share, or publicly expose your private content. Period.
terms.s5_text: The platform uses a credit system called NEURONS to meter AI service consumption:
terms.s5_item1: Credits are consumed when you run AI services (extraction, generation, analysis)
terms.s5_item2: Consumed credits are non-refundable — you received the computational result
terms.s5_item3: Unused credits remain in your account indefinitely unless we notify you otherwise
terms.s6_item1: Upload illegal, harmful, defamatory, or rights-infringing content
terms.s6_item2: Reverse-engineer, exploit vulnerabilities, or attempt to disrupt the platform
terms.s6_item3: Use automated scrapers or bots to extract data beyond intended use
terms.s6_item4: Resell access to the platform without written authorization
terms.s7_text: Outputs generated by our AI services are provided "as-is." Artificial intelligence can produce errors, hallucinations, or inaccuracies.
terms.s7_text2: You are responsible for reviewing and validating all AI-generated content before using it professionally, commercially, or publicly.
terms.s8_text: AI-IDEI is provided without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
terms.s8_text2: Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.s9_text: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, engage in abuse, or create security risks. You may delete your account at any time from Settings → Data & Privacy. Upon deletion, your data is removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by applicable law.
terms.s10_text: We may update these Terms periodically. Significant changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 14 days before taking effect. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s11_text: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Moldova. For users in the EU/EEA, mandatory consumer protection laws of your country of residence apply where they provide greater protection. Disputes shall be resolved through negotiation first, then through the competent courts of Moldova or, for EU consumers, your local courts.
terms.s12_address: Republic of Moldova, r. Ocnița, s-tul Bîrlădeni

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_summary: Your privacy matters. This policy explains exactly what data we collect, why we collect it, how we protect it, and what rights you have. We follow the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and treat all users with the same level of protection, regardless of location.
privacy.s1_intro: We collect the minimum data necessary to deliver the service:
privacy.s1_account: email address, display name, avatar (provided during registration)
privacy.s1_content: transcripts, audio files, and text you upload for AI processing
privacy.s1_usage: service runs, credit transactions, feature interactions (to improve the product)
privacy.s1_auto: IP address (anonymized), browser type, device info, page visit timestamps (collected automatically)
privacy.s2_item1: To provide, operate, and improve the platform
privacy.s2_item2: To process your content through AI pipelines and deliver results
privacy.s2_item3: To manage your account, credit balance, and subscriptions
privacy.s2_item4: To send essential service notifications (job completions, security alerts)
privacy.s2_item5: To detect, prevent, and respond to abuse, fraud, or security incidents
privacy.s3_text: When you upload content, it is processed by AI models to extract knowledge units. This processing happens on secure infrastructure with encrypted connections. Your content is processed, results are stored in your account, and the raw data is not retained beyond what is needed.
privacy.s3_highlight: We never use your private content to train our AI models without your explicit, informed consent.
privacy.s4_measure1: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256)
privacy.s4_measure2: Row Level Security (RLS) — users can only access their own data, enforced at the database level
privacy.s4_measure3: Secure authentication via JWT tokens, rate limiting, and abuse detection on all endpoints
privacy.s5_intro: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only when necessary:
privacy.s5_item1: to process your content (e.g., transcription, extraction). Data is sent encrypted and not stored by providers.
privacy.s5_item2: to handle credit purchases securely via Stripe. We never see or store your card details.
privacy.s5_item3: only when required by law or a valid court order.
privacy.s6_intro: If you are in the EU/EEA, you have the following rights. We extend these rights to all users globally:
privacy.s6_item1: Access — see all data we hold about you
privacy.s6_item3: Erasure — request deletion of your data
privacy.s6_item4: Portability — export your data in JSON format
privacy.s6_item5: Restriction — limit how we process your data
privacy.s6_item6: Objection — object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.s6_contact: Exercise any of these rights instantly from
privacy.s7_text: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management — these cannot be disabled as the platform cannot function without them.
privacy.s7_text2: Analytics cookies (optional) help us understand usage patterns. You control these through the consent banner. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.s8_title: How Long We Keep Your Data
privacy.s8_text: We keep your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all personal data is permanently removed within 30 days, except where legal requirements mandate longer retention (e.g., financial transaction records for tax compliance — up to 7 years).
privacy.s9_text: AI-IDEI is not designed for or directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If we discover that a child under 16 has created an account, we will delete it and all associated data immediately.
privacy.s10_text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Significant changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 14 days before taking effect. The "Last updated" date at the top always reflects the current version.
privacy.s11_address: Republic of Moldova, r. Ocnița, s-tul Bîrlădeni

about.seo_desc: AI Marketing architect, prompt engineer, and founder of Nota Doi. 10+ years transforming chaos into conversions.
about.hero_subtitle: AI Architect & Digital Marketing Strategist. Transforming chaos into structure, content into conversions, and AI into a sales army.
about.hero_motto: Attached To Nothing, But Connected to Everything.
about.intro_p1: Expert in AI Marketing & Copywriting with over 10 years of experience. Founder of Nota Doi — the largest community of marketers in Moldova with 36,000+ subscribers. Creator of an ecosystem of 100+ AI execution agents.
about.intro_p2: Approaches communication and marketing as an art form, transforming chaos into structure and meaning through semiotics, psychology, and behavioral analysis. Focuses on influencing behavior and emotions through AI-powered copywriting.
about.intro_p3: Monthly revenue record: €80,596 (January 2025). Over 1,108 Google reviews with a 4.9/5 rating. Featured in VIP Magazine Moldova's 'Under 40' list. Speaker at the Technical University of Moldova and 30+ conferences.
about.ach_community: 18,000 members in 'Social Media în Culise' — the largest marketing community in Moldova
about.ach_podcast: 30,000+ YouTube subscribers with Anti Podcast Nota Doi
about.ach_awards: 2× 'Person of the Year' for Podcast · Rockit Awards: Best Creator & Best in Marketing
about.ach_academy: 4,500+ clients through Academie Vie (live academy) from Moldova and Romania
about.ach_speaker: Speaker at 30+ conferences · Consulted 500+ entrepreneurs · Trained 50+ companies
about.ach_ai: Creator of 100+ AI execution agents · Pioneer of AI-driven marketing in Eastern Europe
about.spiral_1_desc: Emotional trigger — bypass rational defense, activate primal response
about.spiral_2_desc: Rational argumentation — structure the insight, validate the trigger
about.spiral_3_desc: Engagement & challenge — create participation, not passive consumption
about.spiral_4_desc: Transformation & decision — the point of no return, identity shift
about.val_relativism_desc: Acceptance of diverse perspectives and approaches. Every context has its own truth.
about.val_freedom_desc: Independence and the ability to make your own choices. Fly your own way.
about.val_potential_desc: The desire to help individuals reach their highest level of achievement.
about.cta_text: Ready to see what AI can do for your marketing?

about_platform.seo_desc: AI-IDEI is a knowledge extraction and capitalization platform. Turn content into neurons, neurons into services, services into revenue.
about_platform.hero_subtitle: The Knowledge Operating System that transforms your content into compounding digital assets through AI-powered extraction, analysis, and execution.
about_platform.what_p1: AI-IDEI is a Knowledge Extraction Operating System. It takes your content — podcasts, videos, articles, transcripts — and transforms it into atomic knowledge units called neurons.
about_platform.what_p2: These neurons become the foundation for AI-powered services: article generation, marketing strategies, buyer psychology maps, decision packs, and more. Every piece of content you create compounds in value over time.
about_platform.what_p3: Built by Vadim Cușnir and the Cușnir Media team, AI-IDEI is the engine behind a new model of knowledge work — where expertise is extracted once and monetized infinitely.
about_platform.cap_neurons_desc: Atomic units of validated knowledge extracted from your content. Each neuron is reusable, searchable, and monetizable.
about_platform.cap_services_desc: 30+ AI-powered services that transform neurons into professional deliverables — articles, strategies, reports, and more.
about_platform.cap_graph_desc: Visual map of relationships between your ideas, entities, and insights. Discover hidden connections across your content.
about_platform.cap_intelligence_desc: Automated analysis of patterns, contradictions, and opportunities across your knowledge base.
about_platform.cap_automation_desc: Build automated workflows that extract, analyze, and produce content at scale without manual intervention.
about_platform.cap_marketplace_desc: Publish, license, and monetize your knowledge assets. Create data products from your expertise.
about_platform.security_p1: Row-Level Security on all database tables. Your data is isolated and protected. Authentication required for all operations.
about_platform.security_p2: GDPR-compliant data handling. Full audit logging. Encryption at rest and in transit. Rate limiting and abuse detection.
about_platform.audience_1: Content creators who want to extract maximum value from every piece of content
about_platform.audience_2: Marketing professionals who need AI-powered automation for copywriting and strategy
about_platform.audience_3: Entrepreneurs and consultants building knowledge-based businesses
about_platform.audience_4: Educators and experts who want to monetize their expertise at scale
about_platform.cta_text: Ready to turn your knowledge into a compounding asset?

pricing.hero_desc: Start free. Scale as your knowledge library grows. Every credit turns expertise into reusable intellectual capital.
pricing.topup_desc: No subscription needed. Buy credits anytime at $1 = 500 NEURONS.
pricing.manage_sub_desc: You have an active subscription. Manage payments, change plan, or cancel.
pricing.step_upload_desc: Podcasts, videos, text — any knowledge source
pricing.step_process_desc: Each service consumes NEURONS based on complexity
pricing.step_deliver_desc: 50+ outputs from a single knowledge extraction
pricing.faq_a1: NEURONS are compute credits that power AI service execution. Each service consumes a specific amount based on complexity. Base rate: $1 = 500 NEURONS.
pricing.faq_q2: Can I buy credits without a subscription?
pricing.faq_a2: Yes! Top up credits anytime at the base rate ($1 = 500N). Subscriptions give you a monthly allocation plus discounted execution costs.
pricing.faq_a3: All AI-IDEI prices follow the Root2 principle — the digital root of every price equals 2 (e.g. $11, $47, $128).
pricing.faq_q4: How much does a typical service cost?
pricing.faq_a4: A simple extraction costs 20-47 NEURONS. An article generation costs ~74 NEURONS. A complete pipeline costs ~290 NEURONS.
pricing.faq_a5: Subscribers pay fewer NEURONS per service. Core saves 10%, Pro saves 25%, VIP saves 40%.
pricing.faq_q6: What happens when I run out of credits?
pricing.faq_a6: Your existing neurons and outputs remain accessible. You simply cannot run new AI services until you top up or your subscription renews.
